questions.text: What is the primary role of the projection layer in a vision-language model like LLaVA?
options: To map visual features from the vision encoder into the same dimensional space as the LLM's text embeddings.
To compress images to JPEG formats.
questions.correct_answer: To map visual features from the vision encoder into the same dimensional space as the LLM's text embeddings.
questions.explanation: VLM projection layers act as dimensional translators, converting ViT output matrices into equivalent visual token embedding arrays.
